HOME.NAME: Orel Yaron
HOME.SUBTITLE: Developer · Unreal Engine Creator · Gamer Extraordinaire
HOME.ABOUT_TEXT: A passionate developer with a love for building immersive experiences. From crafting clean, modern web applications to designing worlds in Unreal Engine 5 — I bring ideas to life through code and creativity.
HOME.SHOWCASE_INTRO: A selection of environments and mechanics I've built in UE5.

CV.TITLE: Curriculum Vitae
CV.SUMMARY: Senior Frontend Developer specializing in modernizing legacy systems and building scalable Angular applications. Strong experience leading migrations, implementing advanced architectures (Signals, Reactive Forms) and developing real-time systems. Fast learner with a system-level mindset and strong ownership.
CV.EXP_CAL_1: Led migration of legacy systems from Angular 1 to Angular 21
CV.EXP_CAL_2: Designed and developed complex Reactive & Signal-based forms
CV.EXP_CAL_3: Implemented modern Angular architecture and state management patterns
CV.EXP_CAL_4: Worked with Azure for PR workflows and development lifecycle
CV.EXP_CAL_5: Integrated internal logging and QA systems
CV.EXP_CAL_6: Agile workflow using Jira (sprints, bugs, task tracking)
CV.EXP_NGSOFT_1: Built scalable frontend systems using Angular (8+) with focus on performance
CV.EXP_NGSOFT_2: Developed real-time applications using WebSockets and Node.js
CV.EXP_NGSOFT_3: Designed REST APIs and worked with ElasticSearch & Couchbase
CV.EXP_NGSOFT_5: Developed automation tests using Java & Selenium
CV.EXP_NGSOFT_6: Mentored team members and contributed to engineering practices
CV.EXP_EVIGILO_1: Developed automation tests for distributed web systems (Java, Selenium)
CV.EXP_EVIGILO_2: Worked with JUnit, XPath, Jira and testing frameworks
CV.EXP_EARLIER_2: "Yoles Signs" - Main Graphic Designer (signs and web)

CV.CHARACTER_DESC: Great people skill, high work ethics, responsible, dedicated and assertive.
